---
title: "{{< meta course.title >}}"
---

{{< meta course.semester >}} · {{< meta course.institution >}}

Lecture ({{< meta course.sws-lecture >}} SWS) and practical
({{< meta course.sws-practical >}} SWS), {{< meta course.audience >}}. Module {{< meta course.code >}}.

## Start here

- [How this course works](guide.qmd) — read this first
- [Schedule](schedule.qmd) — what happens when
- [Lecture 01 — Sequence Alignment](lectures/01-alignment/index.qmd)
- [Practical 01 — Pairwise Alignment](practicals/01-alignment/index.qmd)

::: {.callout-note}
New here? The [course guide](guide.qmd) explains the login, the slides, how to
get PDF versions, and how the practicals are set up.
:::
